name: df
description: Feature development and code review workflow automation for individual developers

interface.longDescription: Workflow automation skills and subagents for individual developers: research, plan, implement, phased-implement, validate, iterate, handoff, commit. Invoke skills as $df:<name>; only commit auto-triggers on intent, the rest are manual-only. Subagents must be installed separately — run scripts/install-codex-agents.sh.
defaultPrompt: Create atomic commits for my current changes
